title: Even as Eve
director: Chester M. De Vonde, B.A. Rolfe
actors: Grace Darling, Ramsey Wallace, E.J. Ratcliffe
plot: Eileen O'Hara lives as a member of a cult in a remote retreat in the Adirondacks with her father, an embittered man since his wife's infidelity years earlier. One day, Peyster Sproul, the man responsible for her transgression, app...
